title: AxoNpcs
description: Creates client-side NPCs using packets, allowing NPCs to be visible to players without spawning real server entities.
body:
# AxoNpcs

AxoNpcs is a modern NPC plugin for **Paper** and **Folia**.  
It creates client-side NPCs using packets, allowing NPCs to be visible to players without spawning real server entities.

---

## ✨ Features

- Client-side NPCs
- No real entities spawned on the server
- Optimized per-player viewer system
- NPCs appear when players join, change worlds, or get close
- NPCs hide when players leave, disconnect, or move away
- Visible names
- Skin support
- Rotation support
- Equipment support
- Glowing support
- Interaction actions
- Interaction cooldowns
- One editable YAML file per NPC
- Multi-language messages
- Automatic client language detection

---

## 📦 Requirements

| Requirement | Version |
|-------------|----------|
| Paper/Folia | `26.1.2+` |
| Java | `25+` |
